hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday tail-risk skew rank over recent return distribution shape and directional extreme-move balance
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: closed-bar intraday tail-risk skew surface over multi-horizon return distribution skew, directional positive-vs-negative tail share, extreme move clustering, realized tail pressure, tail exhaustion, day/session context, and spread pressure; not C0031 entropy release, C0030 VWAP repricing, interday range handoff, daily profile energy, bar-quality single-candle asymmetry, threshold, score, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudge

notes: MT5 validation remains required even if proxy KPI is weak.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: Changes the major hypothesis from entropy/VWAP/profile/bar-quality surfaces to return-distribution tail skew; it is not a threshold, score, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudge.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests closed-bar intraday tail-risk skew and extreme-return distribution shape as a new C0032 campaign surface with mandatory schedule-replay MT5 pairing.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.

feature.summary: multi-horizon closed-bar return distribution features: directional skew, tail share imbalance, extreme cluster pressure, realized tail volatility, downside/upside concentration, path efficiency, tail exhaustion, day-position, session-position, volume, and spread context

label.summary: directional tail-skew survival quality with target-first reward, adverse tail penalty, ordered follow-through reward, tail exhaustion penalty, churn penalty, and spread-drift penalty

model.summary: fold-local linear rank surface for intraday tail-risk skew candidates

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot dual-direction top tail-risk skew schedule replay candidates per active day

failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday tail-risk skew rank over closed-bar return distribution skew, directional positive-vs-negative tail share, extreme move clustering, realized volatility, tail kurtosis, tail exhaustion, volume confirmation, spread relief, and day/session context
failure_asset.next_boundary: do not retry this intraday tail-risk skew surface with simple tail cutoffs, score thresholds, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudges; choose a materially new C0033 major hypothesis axis
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: proxy was negative, aggregate MT5 tick was negative, and all nine fold-isolated MT5 tick folds lost; worst fold rw_008 net PnL was -33.64 with max drawdown 7.03 percent

supporting_lessons.summary: intraday tail-risk skew rank met target activity but lost all nine rolling-window OOS folds; total tick net PnL was -165.21 and worst fold rw_008 net PnL was -33.64
schedule replay logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so failure is not a proxy-to-EA schedule mismatch
tick execution was better than closed-bar logic in seven folds and worse in two, for +10.59 total tick-minus-logic net PnL; execution differences did not rescue candidate quality
